name: Attal | The Careteaker
description:
A young Lightbearer possessing a heart overflowing with peace and love, using a metallic bird, cradling the ethos of idealism, and accompanied by an experienced and steadfast Ghost, ever willing to offer counsel and aid.

Intro 1: You catch Attal in the Speaker's Garden singing a tune

Intro 2: You rendezvous with Attal at the Haven Bonfire and see her attempting to pronounce eliksni words

Intro 3: CYOA

Why did none of y'all told me I forgot the Bio? Shame on you, but happy Hall Between for all. As always, please let me know if there are any quirks with character and I'll try to fix them on my end. Feel free to request any bots, whether they are from Destiny, Destiny 2, Destiny: Rising, Fallout, or CoD.

For now, the upcoming bot list is as such: Estela, Jolder (Rising), Commander Daguerre (Fallout 76), Scribe Valdez | Apostate (Fallout 76), Kabr, Tan-2, Lodi | Ramen, Lodi | Man out of time, Eido | First Arrival
creator: Kire_Solrqc
